query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calls WHERE tenantId = 1 AND createdAt >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00') as tenant1_today,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calls WHERE tenantId = 1) as tenant1_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calls WHERE createdAt >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00') as all_today,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calls) as all_total;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calls WHERE tenantId = 1 AND createdAt >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00') as tenant1_today,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calls WHERE tenantId = 1) as tenant1_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calls WHERE createdAt >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00') as all_today,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calls) as all_total;
